languages.text: {n}Под руководством Соломона план был приведен в действие и исполнен с хирургической точностью. Потери среди населения были сведены к минимуму, и вскоре твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, затаившись в своих логовах.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Под руководством Соломона план был приведен в действие и исполнен с хирургической точностью. Потери среди населения были сведены к минимуму, и вскоре твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, затаившись в своих логовах. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Под руководством Соломона план был приведен в действие и исполнен с хирургической точностью. Потери среди населения были сведены к минимуму, и вскоре твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, затаившись в своих логовах.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}

{n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Solomorne'un liderliğinde plan yürürlüğe kondu ve şaşmaz bir kesinlikle uygulandı. Kayıplar asgari düzeyde tutuldu. Çok geçmeden yaratıklar, insan yerleşimlerine yönelik saldırılarını azaltıp inlerine çekildi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne'un liderliğinde plan yürürlüğe kondu ve şaşmaz bir kesinlikle uygulandı. Kayıplar asgari düzeyde tutuldu. Çok geçmeden yaratıklar, insan yerleşimlerine yönelik saldırılarını azaltıp inlerine çekildi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sous la férule de Solomorne, le plan fut mis en œuvre avec une précision redoutable. Les pertes furent très limitées. Peu après, les assauts des créatures sur les colonies humaines ralentirent à mesure que les bêtes restantes se replièrent dans leurs antres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sous la férule de Solomorne, le plan fut mis en œuvre avec une précision redoutable. Les pertes furent très limitées. Peu après, les assauts des créatures sur les colonies humaines ralentirent à mesure que les bêtes restantes se replièrent dans leurs antres.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bajo el liderazgo de Solomorne, el plan se puso en acción y se ejecutó con una precisión exacta. Las bajas se mantuvieron al mínimo. No mucho después, las criaturas limitaron su asalto contra los asentamientos humanos y empezaron a retirarse a sus guaridas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bajo el liderazgo de Solomorne, el plan se puso en acción y se ejecutó con una precisión exacta. Las bajas se mantuvieron al mínimo. No mucho después, las criaturas limitaron su asalto contra los asentamientos humanos y empezaron a retirarse a sus guaridas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在索罗蒙的指挥下，计划得以精准无误地执行。伤亡也被控制到了最低。不久之后，那些怪物对人类定居点的攻势终于减弱，退回了巢穴。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在索罗蒙的指挥下，计划得以精准无误地执行。伤亡也被控制到了最低。不久之后，那些怪物对人类定居点的攻势终于减弱，退回了巢穴。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Unter Solomornes Führung wurde der Plan in die Tat umgesetzt und mit unerbittlicher Präzision durchgeführt. Die Verluste in den eigenen Reihen waren minimal. Bald darauf gaben die Kreaturen ihre Angriffe auf menschliche Siedlungen auf und zogen sich in ihre Verstecke zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Under Solomorne's leadership, the plan was put into action and carried out with unerring accuracy. Casualties were kept to a minimum. Before long, the creatures eased their onslaught on human settlements, retreating to their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Unter Solomornes Führung wurde der Plan in die Tat umgesetzt und mit unerbittlicher Präzision durchgeführt. Die Verluste in den eigenen Reihen waren minimal. Bald darauf gaben die Kreaturen ihre Angriffe auf menschliche Siedlungen auf und zogen sich in ihre Verstecke zurück.{/n}
